title: Verify existing auth middleware implementation
description: The auth middleware implementation already exists and is being used by several API routes. The middleware at `src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts` extracts JWT from Authorization header, returns 401 for missing/invalid tokens, and attaches user context. The `withAuth` HOC at `src/auth/withAuth.ts` wraps route handlers without modifying handler logic. Tests exist at `src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts`. Routes using withAuth include: dashboard/admin-stats, gradebook, gradebook/course/[id], notes, notes/[id].
existing_patterns: src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts:createAuthMiddleware factory with rate limiting, JWT verification, session validation, and user lookup
src/auth/withAuth.ts:withAuth HOC wrapping Next.js route handlers with JWT validation and RBAC
src/auth/_auth.ts:extractBearerToken utility and checkRole RBAC function
src/auth/jwt-service.ts:JwtService with sign/verify/blacklist using Web Crypto API
